prompt_template:
Split the script into 4-5 scenes.
Each scene should include:
- a short headline for on-screen display
- supporting on-screen text
- image prompt for a motion background or b-roll style visual
- voice text
- estimated duration in seconds
- keep pacing tight for an 18-28 second short
- avoid plain text-only slide language
- make each scene visually distinct
